title: FOX (FOXA) News Media Announces Distribution Deal With DIRECTV
text: Fox (FOXA) News Media announces a distribution deal with DIRECTV. FOX Nation and FOX Weather will now be available on DIRECTV STREAM.

title: ‘Yellowstone' Star Kevin Costner Is Coming To Fox News Media's Streaming Service
text: Fox is adding a marquee bit of programming to its Fox Nation streaming service later this year, with the debut of the Kevin Costner-led docuseries "Yellowstone: One-Fifty."
